# Reference Index

The files in this directory group operations by their primary OpenAPI tag.

| Tag | Operations | Description |
| --- | ---: | --- |
| [Addresses](addresses.md) | 3 | Operations related to addresses. Addresses provide standardized address data. |
| [Appointments](appointments.md) | 12 | Operations related to appointments. Appointments are bookings for services that can be rescheduled, cancelled, and confirmed. |
| [Company Users](company-users.md) | 3 | Operations related to company users. Companies capture media for their customers. Company users represent photographers, videographers, administrators, and other staff. |
| [Customer Users](customer-users.md) | 8 | Operations related to customer users. Customers receive media from companies. Customer users represent real-estate agents, assistants, listing coordinators, and brokerage members. |
| [Discounts](discounts.md) | 6 | Operations related to discounts. Discounts support percentage or fixed-amount discounts, and coupon codes. |
| [Listings](listings.md) | 7 | Operations related to listings. Listings are the core entity that connects properties with media services. |
| [Notes](notes.md) | 1 | Operations related to notes. Notes are contextual comments across various entities including orders, listings, customers, and appointments. |
| [Order Forms](order-forms.md) | 2 | Operations related to order forms. Order forms are the customer-facing booking interfaces for service requests, product selection, and appointment scheduling. |
| [Order Items](order-items.md) | 4 | Operations related to order items. Order items are the individual line items within orders. |
| [Orders](orders.md) | 6 | Operations related to orders. Orders are the service orders from customers. |
| [Payroll](payroll.md) | 2 | Operations related to payroll. |
| [Products](products.md) | 5 | Operations related to products. Products consist of the categories and offerings for services and products. |
| [Scheduling](scheduling.md) | 9 | Operations related to scheduling. Scheduling operations provide information about service provider availability. |
| [Tags](tags.md) | 12 | Operations related to tags. Tags are used to organize and categorize content using a flexible tagging system. |
| [Tasks](tasks.md) | 7 | Operations related to tasks. Tasks are used to track work items, assignments, and completion status. |
| [Videos](videos.md) | 3 | Operations related to videos. |
